## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on contract details and next steps for GrowthX engagement with Mithil's company.](https://fathom.video/share/YvjR3QDRBAHpq5JV6fH7btDcundL3p5G?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Phase 1: 3 months (Nov 1 - Jan 31), $30-40K upfront payment](https://fathom.video/share/YvjR3QDRBAHpq5JV6fH7btDcundL3p5G?tab=summary&timestamp=752.0)
  - [Phase 2: 9-12 months, quarterly payments preferred (pending finance approval)](https://fathom.video/share/YvjR3QDRBAHpq5JV6fH7btDcundL3p5G?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
  - [Legal review ongoing; redlines expected on contract, DPA, and security addendum](https://fathom.video/share/YvjR3QDRBAHpq5JV6fH7btDcundL3p5G?tab=summary&timestamp=606.0)
  - [GrowthX to complete Zip portal onboarding this week](https://fathom.video/share/YvjR3QDRBAHpq5JV6fH7btDcundL3p5G?tab=summary&timestamp=850.0)
  - [CMS access for GrowthX team needs confirmation (Nima to initiate request)](https://fathom.video/share/YvjR3QDRBAHpq5JV6fH7btDcundL3p5G?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)

## Topics

### Contract Structure and Timeline

  - [Considering single 12-month contract (Nov 1, 2025 - Oct 31, 2026) vs. split contracts](https://fathom.video/share/YvjR3QDRBAHpq5JV6fH7btDcundL3p5G?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
  - [Phase 1: 3 months (Nov 1, 2025 - Jan 31, 2026)](https://fathom.video/share/YvjR3QDRBAHpq5JV6fH7btDcundL3p5G?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
  - [Phase 2: 9-12 months (Feb 1, 2026 onwards, exact end date TBD)](https://fathom.video/share/YvjR3QDRBAHpq5JV6fH7btDcundL3p5G?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
  - [Target start date: November 1, 2025 (pending documentation and approvals)](https://fathom.video/share/YvjR3QDRBAHpq5JV6fH7btDcundL3p5G?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)

### Pricing and Payment Terms

  - [Phase 1: $30K-40K upfront payment (final amount TBD)](https://fathom.video/share/YvjR3QDRBAHpq5JV6fH7btDcundL3p5G?tab=summary&timestamp=752.0)
  - [Phase 2: Quarterly payments preferred by GrowthX (monthly initially proposed)](https://fathom.video/share/YvjR3QDRBAHpq5JV6fH7btDcundL3p5G?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
  - [Auto-renewal clause to be removed](https://fathom.video/share/YvjR3QDRBAHpq5JV6fH7btDcundL3p5G?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
  - [Total contract value clarification needed (confusion over one-time $40K fee)](https://fathom.video/share/YvjR3QDRBAHpq5JV6fH7btDcundL3p5G?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)

### Legal and Compliance Requirements

  - [DPA (Data Processing Agreement) required despite no PII handling](https://fathom.video/share/YvjR3QDRBAHpq5JV6fH7btDcundL3p5G?tab=summary&timestamp=606.0)
  - [Additional tasks: Vendor Security Survey, Privacy Survey, ERM and Corporate Governance Survey](https://fathom.video/share/YvjR3QDRBAHpq5JV6fH7btDcundL3p5G?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)
  - [Red-lining expected, especially on DPA and security addendum](https://fathom.video/share/YvjR3QDRBAHpq5JV6fH7btDcundL3p5G?tab=summary&timestamp=606.0)

### CMS Access and Content Publishing

  - [GrowthX requests direct staging/publishing access to client's CMS](https://fathom.video/share/YvjR3QDRBAHpq5JV6fH7btDcundL3p5G?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
  - [Nima (client-side) to initiate internal request for GrowthX team access](https://fathom.video/share/YvjR3QDRBAHpq5JV6fH7btDcundL3p5G?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
  - [Critical for efficient content creation and publication](https://fathom.video/share/YvjR3QDRBAHpq5JV6fH7btDcundL3p5G?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)

### Deliverables Overview

  - [Content roadmap creation](https://fathom.video/share/YvjR3QDRBAHpq5JV6fH7btDcundL3p5G?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
  - [SEO audit](https://fathom.video/share/YvjR3QDRBAHpq5JV6fH7btDcundL3p5G?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
  - [AI workflow artifacts for Navon-specific content](https://fathom.video/share/YvjR3QDRBAHpq5JV6fH7btDcundL3p5G?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
  - [Calibration articles for alignment on quality standards](https://fathom.video/share/YvjR3QDRBAHpq5JV6fH7btDcundL3p5G?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to complete Zip portal onboarding by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/YvjR3QDRBAHpq5JV6fH7btDcundL3p5G?tab=summary&timestamp=850.0)
  - [Mithil to confirm quarterly payment possibility for Phase 2 with finance team](https://fathom.video/share/YvjR3QDRBAHpq5JV6fH7btDcundL3p5G?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)

  - [Both parties to work in parallel on outstanding items to expedite process](https://fathom.video/share/YvjR3QDRBAHpq5JV6fH7btDcundL3p5G?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)
